title: Main Navigation
description: Navigate easily between your projects, documentation, and workspace settings.

title: Projects Overview
description: Here you can see an overview of all your projects and active tours.

title: Create a Project
description: Start by creating a new project with its name and domain.

title: Your Projects List
description: Manage your existing projects, get installation snippets, and launch live demos.

title: Install Snippet
description: Copy this script tag and paste it before the </body> tag of your website.

title: Tour Toggle
description: Enable or disable your tour from appearing on your live website.

title: Tour Appearance
description: Customize the theme, primary color, font, and corner styles of your tooltips.

title: Tour Steps
description: Manage all your tour steps here. Drag them to reorder.

title: AI Generate
description: Let our AI agent automatically generate tour steps for your website.

title: Add a Step
description: Manually create a new tooltip step for your tour.

title: Settings Hub
description: Manage your account, preferences, and billing from the settings hub.

title: Account Info
description: View your email and request password resets here.

title: Profile Details
description: Update your display name.

title: Integration Settings
description: Grab the CDN URL and review how to install the script on your site.

title: Billing & Plan
description: Manage your subscription, check your usage limits, and upgrade your plan.

title: Danger Zone
description: You can permanently delete your account and all data here.

title: User Profile Menu
description: Access your profile and sign out from here at any time.

title: Analytics Overview
description: View performance and analytics data for your tour.

title: Key Statistics
description: Quickly check total sessions, completions, and skip rates.

title: Tours Over Time
description: Monitor daily tour starts over the last 14 days.

title: Step Dropoff
description: Analyze which steps users are skipping to optimize your tour.
